OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Guido & Pierina Giosso Family LLP is present. Represented by Denise Hart.
Attorney Philip Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gladys Peacock, Sandra Norwood and Damaya Hodge all present.
Attorney Morris W. Hirsch representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Dec 31-012 is vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Continued To Dec-27-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
